cases.description: Basic ref_text naming a cell literally
ref_text built dynamically by concatenating column letter and a row number
A ref_text string that isn't a valid cell reference in either A1 or R1C1 style -> #REF!
cases.expected_note: https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/indirect-function-474b3a3a-8a26-4f44-b491-92b6306fa261 -- documents that an invalid ref_text returns the #REF! error value

cases.description: a1=FALSE switches ref_text parsing to R1C1 notation; R2C1 means row 2, column 1 = A2
Referencing a genuinely blank cell returns 0, matching normal cell-reference behavior in a numeric context
